---
title: "Cookbook: Release Flow"
---

```yaml
profiles:
  _default: "{{env.QP_PROFILE}}"
  prod:
    tasks:
      deploy:
        when: branch() == "main"

tasks:
  build:
    desc: Build release artifacts
    cmd: make dist

  publish:
    desc: Publish release
    cmd: ./scripts/publish.sh
    retry: 3
    retry_delay: 5s
    retry_backoff: exponential

  deploy:
    desc: Deploy release
    cmd: ./scripts/deploy.sh

  release:
    desc: Release pipeline
    run: build -> publish -> deploy
```

Run:

```bash
QP_PROFILE=prod qp release --events
```
